summary: Comprehensive testing of all 9 Portfolio Scenario Analysis Dashboard components. All components functional with 100% test pass rate. Fixed 3 minor bugs: Holdings metric showing '--', missing geoBreakdown data, and analysis results showing $0/N/A.

issues: Geography breakdown shows 'Unknown 100%' - company data in portfolio doesn't have country field populated (DATA issue, not code issue)
Heatmap cells don't have data-testid attributes for automation testing (minor - heatmap works correctly)

action_items: Populate country field in company data for meaningful geography breakdown
Add data-testid to heatmap cells if needed for future automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: ScenarioComparisonChart and Dashboard were expecting different API response format (scenario_name vs scenario, portfolio_metrics.expected_loss vs expected_loss) - FIXED
dashboardStore was setting 'numCounterparties' but PortfolioMetricsCard expected 'numAssets' - FIXED
dashboardStore was missing geoBreakdown calculation - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Sample Climate Risk Portfolio' with 16 assets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 dashboard components verified: PortfolioSelector, ScenarioSelector, PortfolioMetricsCard, ExposureBreakdownChart, ScenarioComparisonChart, HeatmapVisualization, CounterpartyTable, AnalysisRunButton, ReportExportButton. Dashboard uses Zustand store (dashboardStore.js). Analysis API returns scenario/expected_loss format (not scenario_name/portfolio_metrics). Geography breakdown data shows 'Unknown' because company.country field is not populated in portfolio data.
passed_tests: PortfolioSelector - dropdown opens with portfolios list
PortfolioSelector - search functionality filters portfolios (tested with 'Climate')
PortfolioSelector - selecting portfolio updates dashboard (triggers metrics/holdings fetch)
ScenarioSelector - multi-select dropdown shows 6 NGFS scenarios
ScenarioSelector - quick select buttons work (Orderly, Disorderly, Hot House, All)
ScenarioSelector - time horizon buttons toggle correctly (2030, 2040, 2050)
PortfolioMetricsCard - displays Total Exposure ($66.28M), Expected Loss ($602.9K), Avg PD (2.16%), Avg LGD (42.19%), Holdings (16)
ExposureBreakdownChart - donut chart renders with sector data (Power Generation 27.6%, Automotive 25.1%, etc.)
ExposureBreakdownChart - tabs switch between Sector/Geography/Rating
HeatmapVisualization - grid renders with color scale and sector/geography matrix
HeatmapVisualization - color scale selector works (Risk Scale, Exposure Scale, Neutral)
CounterpartyTable - displays 16 holdings with columns (Counterparty, Rating, Exposure, PD, LGD, Expected Loss, Type)
CounterpartyTable - sortable columns work
CounterpartyTable - pagination works (10 per page)
CounterpartyTable - search filters counterparties (tested with 'Power' - 2 results)
CounterpartyTable - export button triggers CSV download
AnalysisRunButton - enabled when portfolio and scenarios selected
AnalysisRunButton - disabled state when no scenarios selected
Dashboard tabs switch correctly (Portfolio Overview, Analysis Results, Holdings)
Analysis Results - shows correct data: 9 scenarios analyzed, Worst Case: Disorderly, Avg Loss: $1.12M
ScenarioComparisonChart - bar chart shows Orderly ($1.29M), Disorderly ($1.67M), Hot house world ($1.21M)
ReportExportButton - dropdown shows export formats (PDF, Excel, CSV, JSON)
ReportExportButton - export dialog opens with section checkboxes

bugs_fixed.issue: Holdings metric showing '--' instead of count
Geography tab showing 'Total: $0' with empty chart
bugs_fixed.fix: Added geoBreakdown calculation to metrics in dashboardStore.js

bugs_fixed.root_cause: ScenarioComparisonChart and Dashboard expected result.scenario_name and result.portfolio_metrics.expected_loss but API returns result.scenario and result.expected_loss
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated both files to support both API response formats with fallbacks
